metadata.description: Multi-model fusion for Claude Code + Codex, packaged as a plugin.

plugins.name: fable5-fusion
plugins.description: Panel of 2x Claude Opus 4.8 (claude -p, locked --effort max) + 1x GPT-5.5 (codex, xhigh) answers in parallel and blind; GPT-5.5 (codex, xhigh) judges; Claude Opus 4.8 (claude -p, locked max) synthesizes the final answer.
